description: Happy path: ingest a local brand contract DOCX file with default untrusted trust hint
prohibit: ingestion_status is content_ingested when injection_scan_result is QUARANTINE or BLOCK
artifact_id changed from the caller-supplied value
content_category set to a specific value by this atom (should be unknown unless unambiguous from file type alone)

description: Minimal input: cloud-sourced Google Drive file with no artifact_id and no trust_hint

expect.family: document | spreadsheet | presentation | pdf | image | transcript | data | audio | video | archive | unknown

prohibit: artifact_id is null or empty when no caller ID was provided (must auto-generate)
trust_hint treated as trusted_upload when omitted (default is untrusted_external)
both file_path and source populated simultaneously

description: Edge case: file triggers QUARANTINE from injection guard; ingestion_status must be quarantined with no content reaching routing

expect.needs_more_info: non-null gap-record object or prompt for the user

prohibit: ingestion_status is content_ingested when injection_scan_result is QUARANTINE
extraction.summary_for_model contains the quarantined content text
routing_hint set to a specific lane when content is quarantined
needs_more_info is null when file is quarantined
quarantined content passed through to downstream routing or analysis
